title: Principal Plant Manager at Berger Paints Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Berger Paints Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Berger Paints Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Paints Global Group:
Berger Paints Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Paints Global Group!
